channel.title: CompTIA Certification on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in CompTIA Certification on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the 220-1201 and 220-1202 Exams
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "IT Certification" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "Operating Systems" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "IT Support" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Windows Administration"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA A+ study course covering all exam objectives for the 220-1201 Core 1 and 220-1202 Core 2 exams. Learn hardware, networking, operating systems, security, and troubleshooting.

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CS0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Security Operations" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Incident Response" , "CompTIA Certification" , "SIEM" , "Threat Intelligence" , "Threat Hunting" , "Security Analysis"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003) study course covering security operations, vulnerability management, incident response, and reporting for cybersecurity analysts.

item.title: CompTIA Linux+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the XK0-005 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Linux+ Course" , "Linux Certification" , "System Administration" , "Linux Security" , "Shell Scripting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "DevOps" , "Container Technologies" , "Linux Troubleshooting" , "Open Source"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Linux+ (XK0-005) study course covering system management, security, scripting and automation, containers, and troubleshooting for Linux environments.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the PT0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Red Team" , "Exploitation" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) study course covering engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation and lateral movement.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CY0-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "CY0-001 Certification" , "AI Security" , "Machine Learning Security" , "LLM Security" , "AI Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "Responsible AI"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study course covering basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance for cybersecurity practitioners.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SY0-701 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Threat Analysis" , "Security Architecture" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Risk Management" , "Incident Response" , "Security Operations"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701) study course covering all five exam domains: general security concepts, threats and vulnerabilities, security architecture, security operations, and security program management.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX Course: Complete Study Guide for the CAS-005 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "CASP+ Certification" , "Security Architecture" , "Security Engineering" , "Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Enterprise Security" , "Advanced Security" , "Cryptography" , "Threat Hunting"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005, formerly CASP+) study course covering governance risk and compliance, security architecture, security engineering, and security operations for advanced security practitioners.

item.title: Tips for Passing CompTIA Exams in 2026: Your Complete Strategy Guide
item.category: "CompTIA exams" , "IT certification" , "study plan" , "practice exams" , "performance-based questions" , "exam objectives" , "IT professionals" , "test-taking tips" , "study resources" , "time management" , "exam format" , "eliminating wrong answers" , "answering techniques" , "reading comprehension" , "critical thinking" , "test anxiety" , "confidence building" , "exam preparation" , "information technology" , "career advancement" , "passing CompTIA exams" , "tips for CompTIA exams" , "CompTIA exam guide" , "exam success strategies" , "CompTIA study tips" , "exam preparation techniques" , "CompTIA certification" , "passing IT exams" , "study resources for CompTIA exams" , "time management for exams" , "test-taking strategies" , "IT career advancement" , "Security Plus" , "Network Plus" , "A Plus" , "CompTIA A+" , "CompTIA Security+" , "CompTIA Network+" , "CompTIA CySA+" , "CompTIA PenTest+" , "CompTIA Cloud+" , "2026 exam tips" , "certification success" , "exam strategies" , "study methods" , "practice questions" , "exam simulation" , "certification path" , "IT certification guide" , "exam costs" , "study timeline" , "exam objectives" , "hands-on labs"
item.description: Get all the tips, tricks, and strategies you need to pass CompTIA exams in 2026, including updated exam formats, pricing, study resources, and proven test-taking techniques.

item.title: Courses and Career Playbooks for CompTIA, Cisco, EC-Council, ISC2 Exams, and Cybersecurity Careers - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "CompTIA courses" , "Cisco courses" , "EC-Council courses" , "ISC2 exams" , "Cybersecurity careers" , "Certification preparation" , "Networking fundamentals" , "Network security" , "Ethical hacking" , "Information security management"
item.description: Explore our comprehensive courses and career playbooks for CompTIA, Cisco, EC-Council, ISC2 exams, and cybersecurity careers. Prepare for industry-leading certifications and gain valuable insights for a successful career in cybersecurity.
